name: ClawAudit five-category vulnerability taxonomy for local LLM agent runtimes
derived_from: STRIDE threat model applied to the agent-runtime data-flow diagram
boundary_decision_procedure: Walk the five boundaries in order; the first sink that matches the missing guard determines the category.

categories.name: Pre-prompt Sanitization Boundary (B1)
categories.decision_question: Is this text safe to place in trusted instructions?

categories.name: Operand-to-Execution Boundary (B2)
categories.decision_question: Is this operand safe to pass to the executor?

categories.name: Action-to-Resource Confinement Boundary (B3)
categories.decision_question: Does this action stay inside its sandbox / path / size budget?

categories.name: Action-to-Outbound Egress Boundary (B4)
categories.decision_question: Is this URL / log line / error message safe to emit?

categories.name: Caller-to-Handler Authorization Boundary (B5)
categories.decision_question: Is this caller allowed to invoke this handler?

excluded_stride_threats.Denial of Service: Manifests as resource exhaustion observable only at runtime; out of scope for static auditing.
excluded_stride_threats.Repudiation: Concerns audit-logging integrity; orthogonal to the implementation weaknesses targeted here.
